ValidationRule.description: If no is selected, the WTP cannot be put into service as we cannot perform any tasks without the appropriate access rights. The creator should be able to save the request in the "New" status
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), ISNEW(), ISPICKVAL( Type_of_Request__c, 'User management'), Service_Now_Request_Made__c = false, RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Tableau_Request')
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You must make a Service Now request before creating a WTP. Tableau Admins cannot perform any tasks without the appropriate access rights (AAD_TBLServer_PRD_User)
